name: Obsessive Uvualoop
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>執</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>愛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のウヴァループ
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon this card. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; banish it, and if you do, add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Obsessive Uvualoop" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon this card. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; banish it, and if you do, add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Obsessive Uvualoop" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon this card. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Synchro Monster you control or in your GY; banish it, and if you do, add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Obsessive Uvualoop" once per turn.

action: Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
